displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) Vol. 6: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon
synopsis: Comprising a five-issue miniseries, Galaxy’s Edge provides readers a visual adventure through Disney’s Star Wars themed land in a story set between the events of The Last Jedi and The Rise of Skywalker. Fans encounter favorite characters like Han, Chewie, Hondo Ohnaka, and Doctor Aphra, while meeting newcomers like Dok-Ondar and Kendoh Voss. The series serves to deepen the already storied past of Black Spire Outpost, giving travelers another reason to marvel at the place on their next trip to Batuu.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) Vol. 6: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon
